cards.front: What is the purpose of creating a user in a database management system?
cards.back: To create a new user account and grant them access to the database

cards.front: What is the SQL command to create a new user in a database?
What is the SQL command to grant all permissions to a user?
What does the 'ALL PRIVILEGES' keyword grant in MySQL?
cards.back: All privileges, including SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE, on all database objects

cards.front: Why is it important to use a specific hostname in the CREATE USER and GRANT commands?
cards.back: To specify the host IP address or hostname from which the user is allowed to connect to the database
